name: @umbraculum/i18n-react
description: React + next-intl bindings for @umbraculum/i18n. Universal useTranslator hook (web + native) + LocaleProvider context + dual entry points (default + ./next-intl). Platform-classified per sub-plan #9 §1.1 — no brewery-domain logic.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.tsx src/next-intl.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
